items.text: outDec = ACAS when inpGCASImpact > inpACASImpact and inpGCASRecovery + inpACASRecovery ensures no secondary collision
items.fragment: outDec = ACAS when inpGCASImpact > inpACASImpact and inpGCASRecovery + inpACASRecovery ensures no secondary collision
items.requirement_fragment: outDec = ACAS when inpGCASImpact > inpACASImpact and inpGCASRecovery + inpACASRecovery ensures no secondary collision

items.text: outDec = GCAS when not (inpGCASImpact > inpACASImpact and inpGCASRecovery + inpACASRecovery ensures no secondary collision)
items.fragment: outDec = GCAS when not (inpGCASImpact > inpACASImpact and inpGCASRecovery + inpACASRecovery ensures no secondary collision)
items.requirement_fragment: outDec = GCAS when not (inpGCASImpact > inpACASImpact and inpGCASRecovery + inpACASRecovery ensures no secondary collision)

items.text: outDec = static priority-based decision when numberServicesTrue < 2

items.text: numberServicesTrue counts the total number of currently active service requests
